mapper.select: SELECT T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_ENG_NM, T.TM_SHRT_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM, T.TM_ESTBLSH_DT, T.CITY_CD, C.CD_NM AS CITY_NM, T.STDM_ID, S.STDM_KR_NM, EC.CD_DESC AS EMBLEM_CD, CC.CD_DESC AS CI_CLR FROM TM T LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'CITY' AND C.CD_VAL = T.CITY_CD LEFT JOIN STDM S ON S.STDM_ID = T.STDM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD EC ON EC.CD_ID = 'TM_EMBLEM' AND EC.CD_VAL = T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM LEFT JOIN CMN_CD CC ON CC.CD_ID = 'TM_CI_CLR' AND CC.CD_VAL = T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM ORDER BY T.TM_ID

SELECT T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_ENG_NM, T.TM_SHRT_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM, T.TM_ESTBLSH_DT, T.CITY_CD, C.CD_NM AS CITY_NM, T.STDM_ID, S.STDM_KR_NM, EC.CD_DESC AS EMBLEM_CD, CC.CD_DESC AS CI_CLR FROM TM T LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'CITY' AND C.CD_VAL = T.CITY_CD LEFT JOIN STDM S ON S.STDM_ID = T.STDM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD EC ON EC.CD_ID = 'TM_EMBLEM' AND EC.CD_VAL = T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM LEFT JOIN CMN_CD CC ON CC.CD_ID = 'TM_CI_CLR' AND CC.CD_VAL = T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM WHERE T.TM_ID = #{tmId}

SELECT TM_ID, SSNT_YR, STR_CASH, CUR_CASH, TOT_BDGT, PLR_SAL_BDGT, COACH_BDGT, DVLP_BDGT, MKT_BDGT, FCLTY_BDGT, CUR_PLR_SAL_COST, TCKT_REV, SSNT_TCKT_REV, MRCH_REV, SPNS_REV, BCST_REV, PSTSSNT_REV, PLR_SAL_COST, STFF_COST, OPR_COST, OWN_SUPP, DEBT FROM TM_FNC_SSNT WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId} AND SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}

SELECT F.TM_ID, F.FCLTY_TYPE_CD, C.CD_NM AS FCLTY_TYPE_NM, F.FCLTY_LVL FROM TM_FCLTY F LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'FCLTY_TYPE' AND C.CD_VAL = F.FCLTY_TYPE_CD WHERE F.TM_ID = #{tmId} ORDER BY F.FCLTY_TYPE_CD

SELECT TM_ID, SSNT_YR, STR_CASH, CUR_CASH, TOT_BDGT, PLR_SAL_BDGT, COACH_BDGT, DVLP_BDGT, MKT_BDGT, FCLTY_BDGT, CUR_PLR_SAL_COST, TCKT_REV, SSNT_TCKT_REV, MRCH_REV, SPNS_REV, BCST_REV, PSTSSNT_REV, PLR_SAL_COST, STFF_COST, OPR_COST, OWN_SUPP, DEBT FROM TM_FNC_SSNT WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId} ORDER BY SSNT_YR DESC

SELECT U.UPGR_ID, U.TM_ID, U.FCLTY_TYPE_CD, C.CD_NM AS FCLTY_TYPE_NM, U.FROM_LVL, U.TO_LVL, U.UPGR_COST, U.UPGR_BGNG_DT, U.UPGR_END_DT, U.UPGR_STTS_CD FROM TM_FCLTY_UPGR U LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'FCLTY_TYPE' AND C.CD_VAL = U.FCLTY_TYPE_CD WHERE U.TM_ID = #{tmId} ORDER BY U.UPGR_BGNG_DT DESC

SELECT C.CD_VAL AS FCLTY_TYPE_CD, C.CD_NM AS FCLTY_TYPE_NM, C.CD_DESC AS FCLTY_DESC, F.FCLTY_LVL AS FROM_LVL, CFG.TO_LVL, CFG.UPGR_COST, CFG.UPGR_DAYS FROM CMN_CD C JOIN TM_FCLTY F ON F.FCLTY_TYPE_CD = C.CD_VAL AND F.TM_ID = #{tmId} LEFT JOIN FCLTY_UPGR_COST_CFG CFG ON CFG.FCLTY_TYPE_CD = C.CD_VAL AND CFG.FROM_LVL = F.FCLTY_LVL WHERE C.CD_ID = 'FCLTY_TYPE' ORDER BY C.CD_VAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TM_FCLTY_UPGR (TM_ID, FCLTY_TYPE_CD, FROM_LVL, TO_LVL, UPGR_COST, UPGR_BGNG_DT, UPGR_END_DT, UPGR_STTS_CD) VALUES (#{tmId}, #{fcltyTypeCd}, #{fromLvl}, #{toLvl}, #{upgrCost}, #{bgngDt}, #{endDt}, 'CMPL')
mapper.select: SELECT S.STDM_ID, S.STDM_KR_NM, S.STDM_ENG_NM, S.STDM_LOC, S.STDM_ESTBLSH_DT, S.STDM_SEAT_CNT, S.LF_DIST, S.LCF_DIST, S.CF_DIST, S.RCF_DIST, S.RF_DIST, S.TURF_TYPE_CD, C.CD_NM AS TURF_TYPE_NM FROM TM T JOIN STDM S ON S.STDM_ID = T.STDM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'TURF_TYPE' AND C.CD_VAL = S.TURF_TYPE_CD WHERE T.TM_ID = #{tmId}

SELECT E.EXPN_ID, E.STDM_ID, E.TM_ID, E.BFR_SEAT_CNT, E.AFT_SEAT_CNT, E.EXPN_COST, E.EXPN_BGNG_DT, E.EXPN_END_DT, E.EXPN_STTS_CD, C.CD_NM AS EXPN_STTS_NM FROM STDM_EXPN E LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'STDM_EXPN_STTS' AND C.CD_VAL = E.EXPN_STTS_CD WHERE E.TM_ID = #{tmId} ORDER BY E.EXPN_BGNG_DT DESC
SELECT EXPN_STEP, ADD_SEAT_CNT, EXPN_COST, EXPN_DAYS, EXPN_DESC FROM STDM_EXPN_COST_CFG ORDER BY EXPN_STEP
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STDM_EXPN WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId} AND EXPN_STTS_CD = 'PROG'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STDM_EXPN (STDM_ID, TM_ID, BFR_SEAT_CNT, AFT_SEAT_CNT, EXPN_COST, EXPN_BGNG_DT, EXPN_END_DT, EXPN_STTS_CD) VALUES (#{stdmId}, #{tmId}, #{bfrSeatCnt}, #{aftSeatCnt}, #{expnCost}, #{bgngDt}, #{endDt}, 'CMPL')
